infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow Ark to unlock your passphrase-protected notes with Face ID.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Allow Ark to use motion sensors for the compass, level, and other field tools.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Ark to show your position, save map spots, and record tracks while Ark is open.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow Ark to keep recording an active track when the screen is locked or Ark is in the background.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Ark to record short voice prompts for offline transcription.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Ark to attach photos to tracks, saved spots, and Ask Arky chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Ark to choose photos for tracks, saved spots, and Ask Arky chats.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Ark to unlock your passphrase-protected notes with Face ID.
